settings.heading: DISCOVER THE RIGHT PATH FOR YOU
settings.description: Not sure where to begin? Take our quick quiz to find the best starting point for your goals, interests, and experience—we’ll guide you to the path that’s right for you.
settings.quiz_header: How Much Do You Really Know About Fitness?
settings.powered_by: Powered by NPTA™ Canada - National Personal Training Academy
settings.lead_desc: Enter your details to begin the quiz.
settings.lead_required_msg: Please enter your name and a valid email to begin.
settings.send_success_text: Sent! Our team received your quiz results.
settings.send_error_text: Sorry, we could not send your results. Please try again.
settings.results_promo_title: Ready to Become a Certified Fitness Professional?
settings.results_promo_text: NPTA offers comprehensive certification programs that will take your knowledge to the next level. Whether you want to launch your own fitness business or work with established gyms, we will give you the tools, knowledge, and credentials to succeed.
settings.results_promo_points:
Nationally recognized certification
Evidence-based curriculum
Business and entrepreneurship training
Ongoing support and continuing education
settings.tier1_message: Wow! You scored in the top tier. You have what it takes to be an exceptional fitness professional.
settings.tier1_cta: You're already thinking like a certified trainer!
settings.tier2_message: Impressive! You have a solid foundation in fitness knowledge. With certification, you could turn this passion into a rewarding career.
settings.tier2_cta: Imagine what you'll know after certification!
settings.tier3_message: Great job! You know more than the average gym-goer. There’s so much more to discover about the science of fitness.
settings.tier3_cta: Ready to fill in the knowledge gaps?
settings.tier4_message: Everyone starts somewhere! Your curiosity about fitness is the first step. A whole world of knowledge is waiting for you.
